mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.realName AS realname, u.email, u.dpNo AS deptCode, d.departmentName AS deptName, u.roleIds, u.status, u.defaultPage, u.createTime, u.updateTime, u.pwdoverdue AS pwdOverdue FROM fnd_user_info u LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.departmentNum = u.dpNo
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.realName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realname}, '%')
ORDER BY u.createTime DESC

SELECT id, username, password, email, realName AS realname, status, dpNo AS deptCode, roleIds, pwdoverdue AS pwdOverdue, defaultPage, isemail AS isEmail, customInfo FROM fnd_user_info WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT menuCode, menuValue FROM fnd_user_menus WHERE fnd_user_id = #{userId} AND effectiveFrom < NOW() AND (effectiveTo > NOW() OR effectiveTo IS NULL)
SELECT b.path FROM fnd_user_info a LEFT JOIN fnd_menus b ON a.defaultPage = b.path WHERE a.id = #{userId}
